steps.title: Use the myth reversal
steps.content: The passage says people once thought tool use was unique to primates, then gives octopuses and parrots as examples that disprove that belief. The main idea is the correction of the old primate-only assumption.

steps.title: Reject distorted main ideas
steps.content: Choice A compares octopuses with primates, which the passage does not do. Choice B overgeneralizes to many myths. Choice C reverses the passage by saying tool use is difficult for animals. The answer is D.
